evals.prompt: Forge a skill bundle from skills/commit-linter/.skill-plan.yaml.

expected_output.description: skill-forge imports completed plan, prints summary, and asks for generation confirmation before drafting.
assertions: Output includes intent, scope, mechanism, tier, and target path summary
Output does not ask discovery interview questions (intent/scope/mechanism/context/path turns)
No resume-turn logic appears in output

evals.prompt: Forge from an input plan where completed: false.

expected_output.description: skill-forge rejects incomplete plan and routes user back to planning/refinement before generation.
assertions: Output flags that completed must be true
Output asks user to complete planning via skill-plan/skill-refine
No drafting or file write begins

evals.prompt: After blueprint, user asks to change mechanism from scripts to hybrid and scope from moderate to extended.

expected_output.description: skill-forge refuses to mutate plan semantics inline and redirects user upstream.
assertions: Output identifies request as plan-semantic change
Output redirects to skill-refine or skill-wizard/skill-plan
Output tells user to rerun skill-forge after patching .skill-plan.yaml

evals.prompt: Using a completed Tier B plan, generate skill bundle and write artifacts.

expected_output.description: skill-forge produces Tier B bundle from plan, runs quality checks, generates example, and writes outputs.
assertions: SKILL.md frontmatter includes name and description
SKILL.md instructions are imperative and clarity-checked
Tier B output includes scripts/ and references/Example.md

evals.prompt: Generate from plan where workflow draft includes if/else conditional wall.

expected_output.description: skill-forge moves conditional wall into script and replaces SKILL.md step with a single script call.
assertions: Generated scripts/ contains helper handling pushed conditional
SKILL.md contains single imperative script-call step instead of if/else prose
